insights: The market is currently in a consolidation phase, with the 7-day average (1416) slightly outperforming the 30-day average (1396), suggesting a stabilization after the mid-month peak.

While general software engineering roles are showing a slight contraction, specialized technical roles in Data/ML and Infrastructure remain resilient, indicating a shift in hiring priorities toward high-leverage technical functions.
Company tier data shows a cooling trend in FAANG+ hiring, which is being offset by steady volume in Unicorn and mid-market firms, keeping the overall market outlook neutral.
